cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking about the closing time on a Monday in April for the Ecoworld Discovery Centre. First, I need to check the opening times section. The opening times are divided into two periods: April 1st to September 30th and October 1st to March 31st. Since April is part of the first period, I'll look at the first set of times. For April 1st to September 30th, the opening times are: - Monday-Friday: 10 am - 6 pm - Weekends: 10 am - 7 pm The question is specifically about a Monday in April.
